text.title: Agent Kill-Switch Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply agent-kill-switch-design. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Design 3-scope toggle: global, per-tenant, per-tool.
step.description: Input: service architecture. Action: Author config schema.. Output: scope design.

step.name: Implement toggle propagation; benchmark p95 latency.
step.description: Input: design. Action: Code + bench.. Output: ≤5s latency verified.

step.name: Wire structured kill-event log to incident channel.
step.description: Input: observability. Action: Author event emit.. Output: events live.

step.name: Write runbook: who, what, when, and how to recover.
step.description: Input: design + observability. Action: Author runbook.. Output: runbook.

step.name: Test kill + recover in staging on day 0; schedule per-release retest.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Run test.. Output: tested.
